page: Microsoft Azure NP10s is an NPS family virtual machine configured with 10 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor using the x86_64 architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 168.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.8 GB per vCPU. The server does not include any graphics processing units.

For local storage, the NP10s is equipped with 754 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance disk options. The configuration does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory allocation of 16.8 GB per vCPU, this server is optimized for memory-intensive workloads rather than raw compute density. The hardware profile is suitable for database hosting, caching layers, and memory-heavy enterprise applications that require dedicated CPU resources and Premium Storage compatibility without the need for GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure NP10s is an NPS family virtual machine featuring 10 dedicated Intel vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture, managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is characterized by a high memory allocation of 168.0 GB, providing 16.8 GB of RAM per vCPU, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive operations. It includes 754 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, supporting demanding storage configurations. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed for workloads such as database management, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NP10s is an NPS family virtual machine featuring 10 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 168 GB of RAM, and 754 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads and databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NP10s is an NPS family VM with 10 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 168 GB RAM, and 754 GB local storage, optimized for memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: An Intel-powered virtual machine featuring high memory density and local storage for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.
